name: Southern Growth Arc
description: A two-stage campaign that starts with transit-led coastal expansion and then rolls surplus capacity into a larger inland metro push.

stages.title: Stabilize The Coastal Corridor
stages.summary: Prove you can grow the corridor without losing resilience before the inland metro buildout.

stages.title: Scale The Inland Arc
stages.summary: Carry forward budget discipline and political strength into the larger metro expansion phase.
